description: Order of payment from Muḥammad b. [...] b. [...] to Mufaḍḍal, instructing him to pay the bearer 600 nuqra dirhams. Same cluster: T-S AS 183.14, T-S AS 183.15, T-S AS 183.16, T-S AS 183.17, T-S AS 183.18.
description_he: צו תשלום ממוחמד בן [...] בן [...] למופד'ל, המורה לו לשלם לנושא 600 דרהם נוקרה. אשכול קשור: T-S AS 183.14, T-S AS 183.15, T-S AS 183.16, T-S AS 183.17, T-S AS 183.18.
